hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git symbolic-ref -q HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref "@{u}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "[autopush] no upstream configured"; exit 0; }; ahead=$(git rev-list --count "@{u}..HEAD" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ]; then if out=$(git push --quiet origin HEAD 2>&1); then echo "[autopush] pushed $ahead commit(s)"; else echo "[autopush] failed: $out" >&2; exit 1; fi; fi
